← All good news Community

This Bus Driver Knows Every Rider's Name — and Remembers All Their Birthdays

via Local Heroes Desk · 6 hours ago

🚌

Step aboard her morning route and you'll get a greeting by name, a quick word about your week, and — if it's your day — a cheerful "happy birthday" from the driver's seat.

Regulars say the short ride has become the warmest part of their commute, a rolling living room where strangers turned into neighbors one stop at a time.

Curated by Some Good News — we link straight to the original source as soon as it's available.

How Some Good News works

We comb publishers across the web for the stories that make your day a little brighter, show you the headline and a quick summary, then send you straight to the original source for the full story. We don't republish anyone's work — good news belongs to everyone, and credit belongs to the people who reported it.

Spotted something good?

A neighbor, a rescue, a small win on your street — if it made you smile, send it our way.

Send us a tip →
